snapshot.targetText: On 2025-07-19, reflecting on the interoperability platform launch (mid-July 2025), Dana said: 'I stood there in the launch channel with all the confetti emojis and felt... nothing. Not modest-nothing. Actual, echoing nothing.' Dana described this as rattling: 'I hit the biggest professional moment of my life and it was like biting into wax fruit.' Dana said: 'For fifteen years I have basically been the person who is her work. Not in a grim way — I mean it like an engine. The next launch, the next rung, the harder problem. That's how I've always known I'm okay. It's how I know who I am. I'm the one who never turns down the bigger role. Ambition's been my whole spine.' Dana attributed the numbness to grief: 'Everything's been a half-step muted since Mom in a way that still ambushes me.' (2025-07-19)
Priya, closest friend from grad school; ceramicist and freelance designer; they signed up for a Tuesday night pottery class together starting 2025-02-12

Work production incident from post-interoperability platform launch (mid-July 2025) finally closed as of 2025-09-06; work described as 'still a grind' but incident pressure resolved. (as of 2025-09-06)
Sam, partner of six years; described as 'great' support during difficult times
